sections.title: World
sections.editorial: Lead with Hormuz ceasefire as top story; Rubio-Pope meeting is significant diplomatic signal.

expanded_articles.title: Iran's fragile ceasefire tested as IRGC attacks UAE, ~1,600 ships stuck in Strait of Hormuz
expanded_articles.snippet: Iran's IRGC launched missiles and drones at UAE despite the April 8 truce; Trump paused 'Project Freedom' naval operations claiming 'great progress'.

expanded_articles.title: Trump touts 'very good talks' with Iran on Day 68 of Middle East conflict
expanded_articles.snippet: Talks mediated by Pakistan; issues include freedom of navigation, Iran's nuclear programme, reconstruction and sanctions.

expanded_articles.title: Has the US accepted Iran's demand to settle Hormuz first, nuclear later?
expanded_articles.snippet: Sequencing dispute may be central to whether talks succeed or collapse.

expanded_articles.title: Rubio meets Pope Leo XIV at the Vatican, discusses peace in Middle East and beyond
expanded_articles.snippet: 45-minute private meeting; pope gave Rubio olive-wood pen as symbol of peace; tensions persist over White House criticism of Leo XIV.

expanded_articles.title: Marco Rubio meets Pope Leo after Trump's criticism over Iran war
expanded_articles.snippet: Vatican statement said discussions covered wars, political tensions, and difficult humanitarian situations including Cuba.

expanded_articles.title: PSG vs Arsenal Champions League final set for Budapest, May 30
expanded_articles.snippet: Arsenal defeated Atletico Madrid 2-1 on aggregate to reach the final.

expanded_articles.title: Jonathan Pollard announces run in Israeli elections
expanded_articles.snippet: The former U.S. intelligence analyst who served 30 years for spying for Israel announced his candidacy.

sections.title: US & Politics
sections.editorial: Indiana primary results dominate; redistricting battle is the larger structural story for November.

expanded_articles.title: Trump exacts revenge in Indiana: 5 GOP senators who blocked redistricting defeated
expanded_articles.snippet: More than $12M spent by Trump-allied outside groups; 5 of 7 Trump-backed challengers won.

expanded_articles.title: Trump gets revenge, and other takeaways from Tuesday's Indiana and Ohio primaries
expanded_articles.snippet: Results demonstrate Trump's continued grip on Republican primaries even in typically obscure state legislative races.

expanded_articles.title: Democrats win Michigan special election in bellwether district; midterm momentum building
expanded_articles.snippet: Democrats have won special elections in unexpected places, significantly narrowing the House gap even without outright flips.

expanded_articles.title: Redistricting fight intensifies: Republicans drawn new maps in 5 states targeting 13 Dem House seats
expanded_articles.snippet: Unprecedented mid-decade map changes create flux six months before November midterm elections.

sections.title: Tech & AI
sections.editorial: AI investment scale is the dominant structural story; Apple chip diversification is a significant supply chain development.

expanded_articles.title: OpenAI surpasses $25B annualized revenue, taking early steps toward late-2026 IPO
expanded_articles.snippet: Rival Anthropic approaches $19B annualized revenue as the two leading AI labs continue rapid commercial growth.

expanded_articles.title: Google invests up to $40B in Anthropic; Anthropic commits $200B to Google Cloud
expanded_articles.snippet: $10B upfront with remaining $30B tied to performance milestones; Anthropic's $200B cloud commitment cements mutual dependency.

expanded_articles.title: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.7; previews 'Mythos' model to limited partners
expanded_articles.snippet: Opus 4.7 improves advanced software engineering; Mythos described as most powerful model with cybersecurity focus previewed to select partners.

expanded_articles.title: Apple explores Intel and Samsung for US chip production, diversifying beyond TSMC
expanded_articles.snippet: Exploratory talks reflect both tariff pressure and domestic manufacturing push; iOS 26.5 RC also released this week.

expanded_articles.title: OpenAI reasoning model outperforms ER physicians at diagnosis in Harvard/Beth Israel study
expanded_articles.snippet: Model used only electronic health records from a Boston emergency department; published in Science.

expanded_articles.title: Apple settles Siri privacy lawsuit for $250 million
expanded_articles.snippet: Settlement resolves long-running class action over alleged inadvertent Siri activations and data handling.

expanded_articles.title: Trump administration secures AI pre-release evaluation agreements with Google DeepMind, Microsoft, xAI
expanded_articles.snippet: Center for AI Standards and Innovation will evaluate models before public release; represents expansion of federal AI oversight.

sections.title: Faith & Theology
sections.editorial: Pope Leo XIV anniversary is the biggest faith story; Gen Z spiritual openness is the most theologically rich trend piece.

expanded_articles.title: Pope Leo XIV marks one year; Rubio visit signals effort to repair Vatican-White House rift
expanded_articles.snippet: The first American-born pope received Rubio for 45-minute private talks; the pope gave an olive-wood pen as a symbol of peace amid tensions over Iran war criticism.

expanded_articles.title: Gen Z is spiritually open but skeptical of church institutions — 'belief is back,' say missiologists
expanded_articles.snippet: The 2026 mission landscape shows a generation seeking transcendence while remaining suspicious of organized religion.

sections.title: San Diego
sections.editorial: Infrastructure safety and wildfire risk are the hard news; weekend events for balance.

expanded_articles.title: Lake Hodges dam is California's only 'unsatisfactory' dam — rebuild stalled, residents demanding action
expanded_articles.snippet: State allocated $1.5M for brush clearing, but full 173-acre recommendation remains unfunded; flood and wildfire risk unaddressed.

expanded_articles.title: San Diego County wildfire risk elevated after dry March; spot fires hit North County on May 3
expanded_articles.snippet: Unusually hot and dry March conditions have elevated seasonal fire danger; new defensible space rules take effect for most homeowners in 2027.

expanded_articles.title: Gator By The Bay returns to Spanish Landing this weekend with 100+ live performances and 10,000 lbs of crawfish
expanded_articles.snippet: Annual zydeco and blues festival runs through the weekend; free Mother's Day vendor market at Waterfront Park runs concurrently.

expanded_articles.title: GI Film Festival San Diego closes today at Balboa Park's Museum of Photographic Arts
expanded_articles.snippet: The festival highlighting military and veteran stories wraps its May 6–8 run at the San Diego Museum of Art.

sections.title: Maker & Creative Economy
sections.editorial: Hackaday Europe is the community-first story; creator economy data anchors the broader trends.

expanded_articles.title: Hackaday Europe 2026 opens May 16-17 in Lecco, Italy; first speaker slate announced
expanded_articles.snippet: Annual open-hardware gathering features workshops, talks, and community showcases in the Italian lake district.

expanded_articles.title: U.S. creator economy ad spend projected to reach $43.9B in 2026; handmade premium holds strong
expanded_articles.snippet: 70.8% of consumers say they'll pay more for high-quality handmade goods; micro/nano-influencers claim 45.5% of influencer spend.

expanded_articles.title: Hackaday weekly highlights: portable synthesizer, C-3PO LLM droid, CNC camera slider from 3D printer parts
expanded_articles.snippet: Community highlights include a Raspberry Pi 5-powered interactive droid and a camera slider rig with quick-release mounting.

sections.title: Filmmaking Gear
sections.editorial: Sony Cinema Line upgrades dominate; DJI NAB news is a solid secondary story.

expanded_articles.title: Sony BURANO V3.0 firmware launches May 2026 with FF 5.8K 6:5 anamorphic and 120fps S35 modes
expanded_articles.snippet: Also adds 3D LUT scaling support, HLG Mild custom mode, peaking improvements, and S700P command compatibility.

expanded_articles.title: Sony FX6 v6.0 firmware: BIG6 quick-menu and Blackmagic RAW via HDMI now available
expanded_articles.snippet: The Venice-style BIG6 interface overhaul and Blackmagic RAW HDMI output are the two headline additions for working cinematographers.

expanded_articles.title: DJI debuts RS 5 gimbal at NAB 2026; Ronin 4D gets price cut and $1 RAW license
expanded_articles.snippet: NAB 2026 showcase featured a fully built film set on the DJI booth floor; RS 5 features next-gen intelligent tracking.

expanded_articles.title: Sony FX6 and FX3 led Sundance 2026 documentary cameras; Netflix Approved Camera List confirms dominance
expanded_articles.snippet: Sony's Cinema Line appeared in more Sundance 2026 documentaries than any competing camera system.

sections.title: Mito Research
sections.editorial: Strong PubMed results this cycle — include section. Label sources per mito guidelines.

expanded_articles.title: MELAS patients with m.3243A>G show 30% WPW prevalence vs 10% in non-MELAS carriers — UT Houston
expanded_articles.snippet: Conduction abnormalities correlated with heteroplasmy levels; researchers recommend routine cardiology screening for early detection.

expanded_articles.title: Twin MELAS case highlights phenotypic heterogeneity and frequent misdiagnosis; early genetic testing critical
expanded_articles.snippet: Brothers carried m.3243A>G; elder initially treated for viral encephalitis; mother asymptomatic carrier at 30.79% heteroplasmy.

expanded_articles.title: Thiogenesis TTI-0102 Phase 2 (EU) shows 10% fatigue reduction in MELAS vs placebo at Mitocon 2026
expanded_articles.snippet: Mean MFIS score reduction at ~60mg/kg/day vs placebo (p<0.001) presented at Mitocon 2026 in Pisa, Italy.

expanded_articles.title: First US basket Phase I trial for MELAS + LHON-Plus launched at GWU using NIH-funded Glycerol Tributyrate
expanded_articles.snippet: FDA-approved trial by Dr. Anne Chiaramello; funded by NIH's National Center for Advancing Translational Sciences.

sections.title: Electric Vehicles
sections.editorial: Tariff disruption is the dominant structural story; WattEV fleet order is the most concrete deployment news.

expanded_articles.title: Dozen-plus EV models discontinued in US as 25% tariffs and loss of $7,500 credit reshape market
expanded_articles.snippet: Tesla Model S/X, Hyundai Kona Electric, Volvo EX30, BMW i4 among models paused or cancelled; automakers pivoting to domestic production or exiting.

expanded_articles.title: WattEV orders 370 Tesla Semi trucks for California — largest single electric truck deployment in the state
expanded_articles.snippet: 300+ trucks earmarked for joint Port of Oakland program; signals growing commercial-fleet confidence in Class 8 electric trucks.

expanded_articles.title: Ford UEV platform targets $30K midsize EV pickup next year, aiming for Model e breakeven by 2029
expanded_articles.snippet: Universal Electric Vehicle platform built in Long Beach is Ford's bet to end billions in annual EV losses.

expanded_articles.title: Used EV sales surge 27.7% year-over-year; BYD, Chery, and Geely scout Canada after tariff cut
expanded_articles.snippet: Canada slashed Chinese EV tariffs from 100% to 6.1%; three major Chinese automakers now hiring staff and scouting dealer locations in Canada.
